overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian urban environment in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring overgrown vegetation, scattered debris, futuristic vending machines, and a large illuminated purple geodesic dome. The scene is set during an overcast dusk with mixed natural and neon lighting, creating a moody cyberpunk atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a green vending kiosk in an overgrown urban plaza. The camera moves forward through scattered trash and papers, with palm trees and a large purple geodesic dome visible in the distance under an overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a path lined with vending machines, approaching a memorial wall featuring an American flag and graffiti reading DIE DIE DIE. NPCs are visible, including one taking photos of the memorial while another walks toward the camera, and the purple dome remains visible to the right.

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the large illuminated purple geodesic dome, passing purple and red vending machines. A white concrete bench sits near the path as the dome dominates the view, glowing with internal purple light against the overcast sky.

ascending the dirt path toward the large wall with billboards

segments.scene_description: The camera moves up an overgrown dirt path away from the dome, heading toward a large concrete wall featuring large digital billboards. The path is flanked by dense vegetation and piles of trash bags, with the purple dome receding into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a decaying urban plaza that transitions from a cluttered street scene to the imposing presence of a glowing architectural landmark. It begins at a green vending kiosk, moving forward through scattered trash and palm trees toward a distant purple geodesic dome under an overcast sky. As the camera advances along a row of vending machines, the view shifts to a graffiti-covered memorial wall where NPCs linger before the path opens up to circle the massive, internally illuminated purple dome. The scene then glides past red and purple kiosks and a white concrete bench, allowing the glowing structure to dominate the frame. Finally, the camera turns away from the dome to ascend an overgrown dirt path flanked by trash bags and dense vegetation, heading toward a concrete wall topped with large digital billboards.
